Identify Your Niche
Self-Assessment
Selecting the RIGHT niche is a critical first step to creating great
products! Here are a few questions that will help you to start thinking
about the type of niche that’s best suited to YOU!
1. What are your core passions and interests? (i.e. helping
people, mountain biking, fly fishing, etc.)
